principles: Dashboard zeigt Tageslage aus data/YYYY-MM-DD/findings.json, nicht nur Run-Delta.
Emergency RSS writer ist Fallback, nicht Lagebild.
Einzelne Quellenfehler begrenzen Coverage, brechen aber nicht den Feed.

medium.title: The fraud officer in Yogyakarta won’t catch the AI wave, and most ASEAN institutions don’t know it yet
medium.source: e27 Asia Startup and Tech Feed
medium.summary: The fraud officer I sat with in Yogyakarta last month had spent eleven years catching counterfeit invoices, suspicious wire transfers, and informal collusion patterns at a regional bank’s branch network. observe.title: Product DNA testing: How features inherit traits from parent products
observe.source: e27 Asia Startup and Tech Feed

observe.title: Recommerce now half of Carousell’s biz: Is classifieds being quietly phased out?
observe.source: e27 Asia Startup and Tech Feed
observe.summary: Thirteen years after launching as an upstart classifieds app, Carousell Group has finally hit positive EBITDA. FY25 revenue climbed 18 per cent to US$141 million, nearly tripling since FY21.
